description: An AAC and lifestyle app that integrates visual symbols for communication with structured daily routine planning to support executive function in neurodivergent individuals.
title: Twinkl Symbols AAC

description: Official documentation for Google Keep's built-in reminders feature, allowing users to set time-based alerts on notes to support executive function and task management.
title: Google Keep - Reminders Feature

description: Official guide to Google Calendar's reminders system, which integrates with mobile devices to provide audible and visual alerts for appointments and tasks, aiding time management for neurodivergent users.
title: Google Calendar & Reminders

description: Official Apple support page for the Reminders app, featuring location-based alerts, smart lists, and recurring task options to help users organize and remember daily activities.
title: Apple Reminders App

description: Feature page for MyHomework App, which includes automated reminders for assignment deadlines and test dates, specifically tailored for students needing structured academic planning.
title: MyHomework App - Assignment Reminders

description: Guide to Habitica's reminder features within a gamified task manager, helping users build consistent habits and maintain focus through social accountability and automated alerts.
title: Habitica - Task Reminders & Gamification

description: Official iOS app store page for Tiimo, a neurodivergent-focused planner offering executive function support with calming visual interfaces and customizable routines for Android and iOS.
title: Tiimo Official App Store Page

description: GitHub repository containing open-source components and documentation for Tiimo, a neurodivergent-focused executive function tool with calming design patterns for iOS and Android development.
title: Tiimo GitHub Repository (Open Source Components)

description: AAC application designed to support routine communication and language recovery for adults with aphasia, offering structured exercises and visual supports.
title: Communication Journey: Aphasia (App Store)

description: A repository of customizable Notion templates for organizing neurodivergent routines, reducing overload, and tracking daily habits with flexibility.
title: Notion - Neurodivergent Routine Templates

description: Guides and features within Todoist to help neurodivergent users plan routines, manage task overload, and prioritize essential daily activities.
title: Todoist - Neurodivergent Routine Planning

description: A routine mood tracker and emotional regulation app that allows neurodivergent users to log daily moods, habits, and activities to identify patterns and improve emotional self-awareness.
title: Daylio

description: A routine emotional regulation software providing free video courses on mental health techniques, including strategies for managing emotions, anxiety, and stress, tailored for neurodivergent users.
title: Therapy in a Nutshell App
